序列化表格

  • 程序包 org.xiaoyu.micro.exception

    • 异常错误 org.xiaoyu.micro.exception.BeanCreationException

      class BeanCreationException extends BeansException implements Serializable

    • 异常错误 org.xiaoyu.micro.exception.BeanDefinitionException

      class BeanDefinitionException extends BeansException implements Serializable

    • 异常错误 org.xiaoyu.micro.exception.BeanNotOfRequiredTypeException

      class BeanNotOfRequiredTypeException extends BeansException implements Serializable

    • 异常错误 org.xiaoyu.micro.exception.BeansException

      class BeansException extends NestedRuntimeException implements Serializable

    • 异常错误 org.xiaoyu.micro.exception.NestedRuntimeException

      class NestedRuntimeException extends RuntimeException implements Serializable

    • 异常错误 org.xiaoyu.micro.exception.NoSuchBeanDefinitionException

      class NoSuchBeanDefinitionException extends BeanDefinitionException implements Serializable

    • 异常错误 org.xiaoyu.micro.exception.NoUniqueBeanDefinitionException

      class NoUniqueBeanDefinitionException extends BeanDefinitionException implements Serializable

    • 异常错误 org.xiaoyu.micro.exception.UnsatisfiedDependencyException

      class UnsatisfiedDependencyException extends BeanCreationException implements Serializable
